prompt: Design a pricing page in HTML/CSS for a developer tool called 'Forge CLI' with three tiers: Hobbyist ($0/mo), Pro ($19/mo), and Team ($79/mo). Each tier has 4-5 features. Make it feel premium and developer-focused.

assertions.text: All 3 tiers present with correct prices: $0, $19, $79
Does NOT use a standard 3-card side-by-side grid as the ONLY layout structure
Does NOT use purple/violet as the primary accent color
Uses a monospace or developer-appropriate font (not Inter/Roboto)
Includes CSS custom properties for theming
Layout/design feels authentically developer-focused (terminal aesthetics, code-like elements, etc.) rather than generic SaaS pricing
